description_long: This helmet features a robust, angular shell with a matte black finish and subtle wear marks, suggesting heavy-duty use. The front is dominated by a large, dark-tinted full-face visor that seamlessly integrates into the helmet's structure, providing maximum facial coverage. On both sides, there are prominent circular mechanical components, possibly for communication or ventilation, with gear-like detailing and small emblematic markings. The top of the helmet has a series of raised ridges, adding to its tactical, futuristic appearance. The rear is reinforced with layered, armored plating, enhancing protection and durability. Overall, the helmet exudes a high-tech, utilitarian design suitable for urban tactical or motorcycling scenarios.
description: A matte black, full-face helmet with a large tinted visor, mechanical side details, and armored rear plating, showing a rugged, futuristic design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large, dark-tinted visor covering most of the face and the angular, armored shell.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the circular mechanical component with gear-like detailing and the raised ridges on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the layered, reinforced plating and the central ridge running from top to bottom.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the mechanical component and the seamless integration of the visor.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, circular emblem with geometric lines is visible on the side mechanical component, but no recognizable brand or text is present.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: No visible ventilation openings or vents are present on the helmet's surface.
